home_hero_body: Hair and makeup artistry for your most unforgettable moments — weddings, prom, and every celebration in between.
home_about_headline: Your Hair & Makeup Artist, All in One
home_about_body_1: Hi, I'm Kaitlyn! I'm a bridal hairstylist and makeup artist based in Northern Colorado, passionate about helping every client feel their most confident and beautiful on their biggest day.
home_about_body_2: From ethereal bridal looks to bold prom glam, I bring a personalized touch to every appointment — because your look should feel like you, just elevated.
testimonial_1_text: "Kaitlyn was my makeup artist for my wedding back in September, and I truly couldn’t have asked for a better experience. From start to finish, she was thoughtful, professional, and incredibly talented. Before the wedding, she did a thorough consultation where she asked all the right questions: my overall vision, the look I was hoping to achieve, my skin type and sensitivities, what makeup I normally wear, and anything I definitely didn’t want. She paid attention to every detail and even followed up with product suggestions and a plan that matched both my preferences and what would photograph beautifully. She picked out products that worked perfectly with my skin and helped bring my vision to life. On the day of the wedding, Kaitlyn arrived right on time and immediately created such a calm, positive atmosphere for me and my bridesmaids. She was organized with her schedule, made sure each girl had dedicated time, and never made anyone feel rushed. She checked in with me throughout the process, making sure I felt good, that nothing was irritating my skin, and that the final look was exactly what I wanted. My makeup held up flawlessly all day, and I genuinely felt like the best version of myself. Kaitlyn is not only incredibly skilled, but she truly cares about her brides and their experience. I would recommend her to anyone without hesitation. She helped make my wedding day feel seamless and special, and I’m so grateful we had her with us."
testimonial_2_text: "Kaitlyn has done my hair for each high school dance I had. Every time she perfectly executed what I was imagining and made it even better! she is so fun to hang out with while she's working and makes everything so seamless and easy for the client! She brings customer service and beauty together to make everyone feel extra comfortable and happy with the end product! I would highly recommend her to anyone for hair or makeup!!"
testimonial_3_text: "Kaitlyn is an absolute angel! She did my hair for my cousins wedding in September of 2025 and was careful, kind, and patient. She listened to what I wanted and gracefully worked through my long thick hair. She even touched up after some photos so I looked my absolute best during the ceremony. 10/10, I couldn’t recommend her enough!"
about_quote: "I'm so happy you're here. Feel free to reach out with any questions."
about_bio_p1: Hi, I'm Kaitlyn — a bridal hairstylist and makeup artist based in Northern Colorado. I started Bridal Glam by Kaitlyn because I believe every person deserves to feel truly beautiful on the moments that matter most.
about_bio_p2: What sets me apart? I do hair and makeup, which means you get a cohesive look from one artist who knows exactly how your full look is coming together — without coordinating between two different people on your big day.
about_bio_p3: I specialize in weddings, prom, and special events across the Loveland, Fort Collins, Greeley, and Kersey areas. Whether you want something soft and romantic or bold and editorial, I'll work with you to create a look that feels authentically you.
about_bio_p4: With a 100% recommendation rate from all my clients, my goal is simple: show up, make you feel incredible, and give you memories you'll love looking back on.
about_story_caption: Yes — that's really me, doing hair for others on my own wedding day. That's how much I love this.
